general_provisions: This bill addresses withdrawal of a county or a municipality from a special district under certain circumstances.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms and modifies definitions;<hr><ltbullet>provides a process for a county of the first class to initiate withdrawal from a first responder district;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the process to conduct a feasibility study on withdrawal from a first responder district;<hr><ltbullet>creates a process for a county of the first class or a municipality located in a county of the first class to initiate withdrawal from a garbage disposal district;<hr><ltbullet>prohibits a garbage disposal district from incurring debt, issuing bonds, or otherwise incurring a financial obligation for a period of time after the county or municipality initiates the process to withdraw from the garbage disposal district;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes a county or municipality and a garbage disposal district to enter into an agreement to withdraw;<hr><ltbullet>describes the requirements for a county or municipality to complete withdrawal from a garbage disposal district absent an agreement, including:<hr><ltbullet1>conducting a feasibility study;<hr><ltbullet1>conducting a public hearing on the proposed withdrawal;<hr><ltbullet1>providing notice of a public hearing on the proposed withdrawal; and<hr><ltbullet1>adopting a resolution to withdraw;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the process to file with the lieutenant governor certain documents;<hr><ltbullet>describes the process to determine the effective date of a withdrawal; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
